sqlMap.sql: select survey_id, company_id, tenant_id, title, purpose, user_id, date_add(create_date, interval #offset# minute) as create_date, date_add(update_date, interval #offset# minute) as update_date, date_add(start_date, interval #offset# minute) as start_date, date_add(end_date, interval #offset# minute) as end_date, case when #primary# = '1' then user_name1 else user_name2 end as user_name, user_name1, user_name2, delete_user, update_user, use_status, open_days, result_public_flag, anonymous_flag, multi_answer_flag, participate_flag, attach_flag, modify_flag from tbl_survey

where use_status = 1 and tenant_id = #tenantId#
title like concat('%', concat(#title#, '%'))
user_name1 like concat('%', concat(#creatorName#, '%')) user_name2 like concat('%', concat(#creatorName#, '%'))
title like concat('%', concat(#title#, '%'))
user_name1 like concat('%', concat(#creatorName#, '%')) user_name2 like concat('%', concat(#creatorName#, '%'))
(create_date >= #startDate# and create_date <= #endDate#)
(start_date <= #today# and end_date >= #today#) (survey_id = -1)
(survey_id in #surveyIds[]#)
(end_date < #today#) (survey_id = -1)
(survey_id in #surveyIds[]#)
user_id = #userId# and use_status = 1
user_id = #userId# and use_status = 3
sqlMap.select: select dept_cd_path from tbl_deptmaster where cn = #deptId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

select a.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then a.displayname else a.displayname2 end as dept_name, a.displayname as dept_name1, a.displayname2 as dept_name2, a.mail as mail, #level# as dept_level, case when (select count(b.cn) from tbl_deptmaster b where a.cn = b.extensionattribute1 and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub from tbl_deptmaster a where a.cn = #deptId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#

select a.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then a.displayname else a.displayname2 end as dept_name, a.displayname as dept_name1, a.displayname2 as dept_name2, a.mail as mail, #level# as dept_level, case when (select count(b.cn) from tbl_deptmaster b where a.cn = b.extensionattribute1 and b.cn <> b.extensionattribute2 and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub from tbl_deptmaster a where a.extensionattribute1 = #deptId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.cn <> a.extensionattribute2 order by lpad(ifnull(a.extensionattribute15, 0), 6, 0), a.displayname

select count(aa.cn) from ( select cn from tbl_usermaster where department = #deptId# and cn != 'masteradmin' and cn not in (select cn from tbl_usermaster_retire where tenant_id = #tenantId#) and tenant_id = #tenantId#
union all
select a.cn from tbl_addjobmaster b join tbl_usermaster a on a.cn = b.cn and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where b.deptid = #deptId# and b.tenant_id = #tenantId# ) aa

SELECT AA.CN AS CN, AA.POSITION AS POSITION, AA.DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME, AA.DISPLAYNAME1 AS DISPLAYNAME1, AA.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DISPLAYNAME2, AA.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, AA.DEPARTMENTNAME AS DEPARTMENTNAME, AA.DEPARTMENTNAME1 AS DEPARTMENTNAME1, AA.DEPARTMENTNAME2 AS DEPARTMENTNAME2, AA.TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, AA.MAIL AS MAIL, AA.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USERIMAGE FROM ( SELECT CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END AS POSITION, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME1, DISPLAYNAME2 AS DISPLAYNAME2, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENTNAME, DESCRIPTION AS DEPARTMENTNAME1, DESCRIPTION2 AS DEPARTMENTNAME2, TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, MAIL AS MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #deptId# AND CN != 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN A.TITLE ELSE A.TITLE2 END AS POSITION, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, A.DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME1, A.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DISPLAYNAME2, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN A.DESCRIPTION ELSE A.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENTNAME, A.DESCRIPTION AS DEPARTMENTNAME1, A.DESCRIPTION2 AS DEPARTMENTNAME2, A.TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, A.MAIL AS MAIL, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #deptId# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC LIMIT #startPoint#, #listCount#

SELECT COUNT(AA.CN) FROM ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN != 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND $srchOption$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #srchValue#, '%') ) AA

SELECT AA.CN AS CN, AA.POSITION AS POSITION, AA.DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME, AA.DISPLAYNAME1 AS DISPLAYNAME1, AA.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DISPLAYNAME2, AA.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, AA.DEPARTMENTNAME AS DEPARTMENTNAME, AA.DEPARTMENTNAME1 AS DEPARTMENTNAME1, AA.DEPARTMENTNAME2 AS DEPARTMENTNAME2, AA.TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, AA.MAIL AS MAIL, AA.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USERIMAGE FROM ( SELECT CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END AS POSITION, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME1, DISPLAYNAME2 AS DISPLAYNAME2, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENTNAME, DESCRIPTION AS DEPARTMENTNAME1, DESCRIPTION2 AS DEPARTMENTNAME2, TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, MAIL AS MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN != 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND $srchOption$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #srchValue#, '%') ) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC LIMIT #startPoint#, #listCount#
select * from tbl_survey_config where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: select 1 from dual where not exists (select tenant_id, user_id from tbl_survey_config where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)
insert.isEqual: insert into tbl_survey_config (user_id, company_id, list_count, preview_flag, list_w_percent, list_h_percent, tenant_id) values (#userId#, #companyId#, #listCount#, #prevMode#, #contentWPrev#, #contentHPrev#, #tenantId#)
insert.isNotEqual: update tbl_survey_config set preview_flag = #prevMode#, list_count = #listCount#, list_w_percent = #contentWPrev#, list_h_percent = #contentHPrev# where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select:
select s2.* from (
where survey_id in #surveyList[]# and use_status != 0 and tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId# ) s2

select d4.cn from ( select * from tbl_deptmaster d1 where d1.cn = #deptId# and d1.tenant_id = #tenantId# union select * from tbl_deptmaster d2 where d2.cn = #companyId# and d2.tenant_id = #tenantId# union select d3.* from tbl_deptmaster d3 join tbl_addjobmaster a on d3.cn = a.deptid and a.cn = #userId# and d3.tenant_id = a.tenant_id where d3.tenant_id = #tenantId# ) d4

select survey_id from tbl_survey_participant where ( (user_id = #userId# and user_type = 'user') or (user_id in
#deptList[]# and (user_type = 'dept' or user_type = 'comp') ) ) and tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_survey ( title, purpose, user_id, create_date, start_date, end_date, user_name1, user_name2, use_status, open_days, result_public_flag, anonymous_flag, multi_answer_flag, participate_flag, attach_flag, modify_flag, delete_user, update_user, update_date, company_id, tenant_id ) values ( #title#, #purpose#, #creatorId#, #createDate#, #startDate#, #endDate#, #creatorName1#, #creatorName2#, #useStatus#, #openDays#, #resultPublicFlag#, #anonymousFlag#, #multiAnswerFlag#, #paritipateFlag#, #attachFlag#, #modifyFlag#, #deleteUser#, #updateUser#, #updateDate#, #companyId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.update: update tbl_survey set title = #title#, purpose = #purpose#, user_id = #creatorId#, create_date = #createDate#, start_date = #startDate#, end_date = #endDate#, user_name1 = #creatorName1#, user_name2 = #creatorName2#, use_status = #useStatus#, open_days = #openDays#, result_public_flag = #resultPublicFlag#, anonymous_flag = #anonymousFlag#, multi_answer_flag = #multiAnswerFlag#, participate_flag = #paritipateFlag#, attach_flag = #attachFlag#, modify_flag = #modifyFlag#, delete_user = #deleteUser#, update_user = #updateUser#, update_date = #updateDate# where survey_id = #surveyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.select: select ifnull(max(survey_id) + 1, 1) from tbl_survey
select count(survey_id) from tbl_survey
order by update_date desc, survey_id desc $sqlOrder$, update_date desc, survey_id desc limit #startPoint#, #listCount#
sqlMap.update:
update tbl_survey set update_date = #updateTime#, delete_user = #userId#, use_status = 0 where tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId# and use_status != 0 and survey_id in
#itemList[]#
sqlMap.select: where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_survey_question ( survey_id, question_type, title, levels, use_status, required_flag, logic_flag, slider_logic_point, company_id, tenant_id ) values ( #surveyId#, #type#, #content#, #level#, #useStatus#, #required#, #logicFlag#, #sliderLogicPoint#, #companyId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.select: select ifnull(max(question_id) + 1, 1) from tbl_survey_question
select * from tbl_survey_question where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by levels asc
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_survey_question where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_survey_option ( survey_id, question_id, question_type, content, levels, other_flag, logic_num, row_level, column_level, company_id, tenant_id ) values ( #surveyId#, #questionId#, #questionType#, #content#, #level#, #otherFlag#, #logic#, #rowLevel#, #colLevel#, #companyId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.select: select ifnull(max(option_id) + 1, 1) from tbl_survey_option
select * from tbl_survey_option where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by question_id asc, levels asc
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_survey_option where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select * from tbl_survey_attachfile where target_id = #surveyId# and target_type = 'survey' and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

select * from tbl_survey_attachfile where ( ( target_id in #questionIds[]# and target_type = 'question' ) or ( target_id in #optionIds[]# and target_type = 'option' ) ) and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by target_type desc, target_id asc
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_survey_attachfile where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_survey_participant ( survey_id, user_type, user_id, user_name1, user_name2, email, dept_id, dept_name1, dept_name2, company_id, tenant_id ) values ( #surveyId#, #userType#, #userId#, #userName1#, #userName2#, #email#, #deptId#, #deptName1#, #deptName2#, #companyId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.select: select participant_id, survey_id, user_type, user_id, case when #primary# = '1' then user_name1 else user_name2 end as user_name, user_name1, user_name2, email, dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then dept_name1 else dept_name2 end as dept_name, dept_name1, dept_name2, company_id, tenant_id from tbl_survey_participant where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_survey_participant where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select count(reponse_id) from tbl_survey_response where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
